## Cross-Account and Cross-Region Backup

This template sets up a centralized backup vault that receives copies from backup plans in other AWS accounts. For this to work, cross-account backup must be enabled in your AWS Organizations management account. See [Backups](../../goldstack/backups/index.md) for more information.
